notes: v0.16.25 — Module library hover tooltip. Long module descriptions were getting clipped on the hex tile; bonus text moved off the tile entirely. Hover any module hex now and a cyberdeck-styled tooltip pops up with rarity strip, name, slot/rarity tags, and the full word-wrapped description. Locked modules show a 'ROLL THIS FROM A BOSS CLEAR' hint in the tooltip. Tile is back to its compact 96×124 size — just hex + name + rarity dot. Windows only.
